title: Candy Crush Saga

title: Coin Master
notes:

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

title: Total Battle: Krigsstrategi
notes:
Ert kungarike blir starkare, ers majestät. Kolla in vad V345 har att erbjuda dig:

Buggfixar
– Vi har implementerat en möjlig fix för den visuella buggen som påverkade visningen av tapperhetspoäng som tjänats in i säsongsturneringar.
– I händelsen Krigsverktyg fick vissa spelare inga poäng för att samla heliga drycker. Vi har vidtagit åtgärder för att lösa det här problemet.
– I sällsynta fall kunde vissa spelare inte använda påskyndningar på sina marscher. Vi har arbetat med att åtgärda detta.

title: Clash of Critters
notes:
1. New Fire Tatari Blowfin with unique Horde Invasion skills.
2. Shrimpyro→Pyroviathan (T4), Lullelly→Somnrayna (T4).
3. Cozy Farm: Added 2 new crops and improved overall experience.
4. Lowered enemy difficulty, removed T4 Aura animation, fixed Horde Invasion skill rates.
5. Super Drinks from Island Goldrush rounds 1–3; team leader role transfer.
6. Invite friends who haven't logged in; element/class filters; HOT label on Trials.

title: Sunday City: Life Simulator
notes:
Residents of Sunday City, we have great news! You can finally acquire your own apartment! Also, a new ship is arriving in the city, and there’s much more to come.
- Apartment: purchase your own living space, customize it and invite friends over.
- Trophies: show off special awards in your apartment.
- Meowpatra's Tales: a new ship has arrived at the pier, come check it out!
- Season Pass: complete quests, earn tons of rewards, and obtain unique skins.
- Businesses: 15 new businesses await you!
